decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to base_record_id route_bx12-plus. Registry record route_bx12-plus (BX12-SBS) matches on route_id Bx12, route_type SBS/Select Bus Service, borough Bronx. Evidence source 2012_02_brt_webster_cac1_summary is already in the route_bx12-plus source_ids. No other registry record represents the same Bx12 SBS route.

Observation already resolves to base_record_id route_bx41-local-2012-02-brt-webster-cac1. Registry record exists with same ID; match on route_id Bx41, route_type local, borough Bronx. Evidence source 2012_02_brt_webster_cac1_summary is already in the registry card's source_ids. Observation correctly identified.
